response.justification: Strong full-stack background with 15+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Recent roles directly align with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship via TDD, CI/CD, and workshops indicates strong engineering practices. Some gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin, and explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth, but the breadth and seniority compensate.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB experience plus current AI-agent and MCP work
Deep software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
15+ years across web, mobile, embedded with proven full-stack ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin/Java exposure is limited and dated (robotics work circa 2016-2018)
Cloud (AWS CDK only) and Kubernetes/Docker depth not strongly demonstrated
